'''Maarwraawroo''' was a large [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].<ref name="Secrets of Kashyyyk" /> It had been built around manufacturing facility in the intertwined branches of the world's [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] [[Wroshyr tree/Legends|wroshyr trees]].<ref name="Secrets of Kashyyyk" />

==Behind the scenes==
Maarwraawroo was mentioned in "[[Secrets of Kashyyyk]]," an article written by [[J.D. Wiker]] and [[Craig Robert Carey]] for the [[Star Wars Gamer 4|fourth issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Gamer]]'' magazine published by [[Wizards of the Coast]]<ref name="Secrets of Kashyyyk" /> on [[June 19]], [[2001]]<ref name="SW.com">{{SWArchive|url=gaming/other/rpg/news20010503.html|text=The Wild Side of ''Star Wars Gamer''}}</ref>
